title: Network Evidence, Safety, and Troubleshooting Method · Incident Case: Net Troubleshooting Method
summary: Operate a safe virtual help-desk lab with tickets, diagrams, baselines, commands, packet evidence, and change records. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net troubleshooting method increment in a reproducible network evidence notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Apply identify, theorize, test, plan, implement or escalate, verify, prevent, and document steps to one network incident.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Build Net Troubleshooting Method evidence
steps.instruction: Append a safe investigation headed "# Evidence: net-troubleshooting-method-1iqbd9" with a concrete hypothesis, one read-only network command, and an observation that changes the next decision.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Net Troubleshooting Method into observable performance evidence.
